plugins.cameraPermission: Darkroom needs camera access to show a live preview and capture photos to style.

plugins.photosPermission: Darkroom needs access to your photos so you can apply a style to them.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Darkroom needs permission to save your styled photos to your camera roll.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Darkroom needs access to your photos so you can apply a style to them.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Darkroom needs permission to save your styled photos to your camera roll.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Darkroom needs camera access so you can take a photo to style.
